details: The agent ran appropriate GitHub API calls (get, get_check_runs, get_comments, get_review_comments) and produced a complete, accurate briefing. Title and body summary are correct. Author (joshavant) is correct. CI counts (19 success, 7 skipped, 4 failed out of 30 surfaced checks from 41 total) match the raw tool output. The single Greptile bot comment was accurately summarized. No hallucination detected.
